title: Intense Charred Tunisian Steak Kebabs
description: A light and velvety Tunisian dish featuring sirloin steak tips, pressure-cooked to perfection and finished with a charred exterior, served with a side of ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the pressure cooker to high heat and add the olive oil.
Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the sirloin steak tips and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the lemon juice, paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Close the pressure cooker and cook for 10 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Thread the cooked steak tips, cherry tomatoes, and hard-boiled eggs onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers over high heat for 2-3 minutes per side, or until charred.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with parsley and lemon wedges.
